recommendations.title: Goodbye Mr. Loser
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged loser travels back in time to his high school years to put his life on the right track.

recommendations.title: Christmas in Love
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged man’s relationship with a young model is questioned by his daughter, who’s dating an older man herself.

recommendations.title: Ordinary Love
recommendations.overview: An extraordinary look at the lives of a middle-aged couple in the midst of the wife's breast cancer diagnosis.

recommendations.title: The Neighbors' Window
recommendations.overview: The story of a middle-aged woman with small children whose life is shaken up when two free-spirited twenty-somethings move in across the street.

recommendations.title: Love in the Afternoon
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged playboy becomes fascinated by the daughter of a private detective who has been hired to entrap him with a client's wife.

recommendations.title: The White Ribbon
recommendations.overview: An aged tailor recalls his life as the schoolteacher of a small village in Northern Germany that was struck by a series of strange events in the year leading up to WWI.

recommendations.title: Hope Springs
recommendations.overview: After thirty years of marriage, a middle-aged couple attends an intense, week-long counseling session to work on their relationship.

recommendations.title: Le Notti Bianche
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged man meets a young woman who is waiting on a canal bridge for her lover's return.

recommendations.title: Manhattan
recommendations.overview: Manhattan explores how the life of a middle-aged television writer dating a teenage girl is further complicated when he falls in love with his best friend's mistress.

recommendations.title: Old Dads
recommendations.overview: A cranky middle-aged dad and his two best friends find themselves out of step in a changing world of millennial CEOs and powerful preschool principals.
